Metals studs poke through the woodwork of this ornate chest. Judging by the fine craftsmanship, this strongbox appears to have been intended for public display.

Shaman said that warrior's shield is his bravery and rage. But sometimes even tribesmen use shields. Usually guardians of more important places or persons. Their shields although looks barbaric posses powerfull defensive magic.
Barbaric shield, yuck! Old skins and rotten wood.
The most basic type of leather armor, soft leather offers minor protection but does little to prevent wounds from arrows, bolts, or stabbing weapons.
A suit of soft leather armor.

Scalemail is made by overlapping small, scale shaped pieces of metal much like a snake's skin.  It protects well against slashing and blunt weapons, but piercing weapons are able to slip between the scales easily.  It is heavy in comparison to it's protection and the scales scrape together while moving.
This Magical amulet has the ability to throw magic Missiles at a target several times a day.
It brings the power of the Storm King to your hand.
This book at a glance tells of the almighty guild, the Mages Collect.
